scraped.title: Garlic Butter Shrimp in 10 Minutes
scraped.description: This easy garlic butter shrimp recipe is an amazing flavor combination of garlicky, buttery goodness.

ingredients.name: salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
hot sauce of your choice (we used Sriracha)
of  lemon, or more, to taste

steps: To make your garlic butter shrimp: Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. In a bowl, season shrimp with salt, pepper, and onion powder, to taste. Add shrimp to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until shrimp is pink, about 2-3 minutes; then set aside on a shallow plate.

Add garlic to the same skillet and cook, stirring frequently, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Stir in chicken stock, hot sauce, and lemon juice to deglaze. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer until reduced by half, about 1-2 minutes. Stir in the remaining 6 tablespoons butter, 1 tablespoon at a time, until melted and smooth.

Stir in shrimp and gently toss to combine with the garlic butter sauce. Reheat for 1 minute, then serve the garlic butter shrimp immediately, garnished with chili pepper flakes and fresh chopped parsley, if desired. Enjoy! 🍤
